directive_events.owner_directive: Convention doc + dispatch checklist landed; 11 implementer agents (one per public module) + 3 no-context audits; manager owns the single ledger, integration, and final PR.
Also document public class attributes and properties (attribute docstrings) so they appear in the generated API reference; verified mechanism (no build-tooling change needed).
directive_events.reason: Owner added requirement: public class attributes/properties (e.g. block ui_icon) are dropped from the generated reference because they lack docstrings; document them with attribute docstrings so they render with descriptions.

owner_directive: Manager-coordinated de-jargon + standard-shape docstring cleanup of the ADR-052 public API surface; dispatch one agent per public module + no-context audits; one combined PR closing #1845 (umbrella #1843 stays open).

scope_events.reason: Add committed dispatch-prompt evidence file to scope.

test_events.rationale: Docstring/comment content only; no runtime behavior change. Existing public-surface freeze tests (tests/api/, tests/stability/) guard behavior and are run by the final gate check.
